name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, butter, and oil until well combined.
4. In a small bowl, combine milk and lemon juice; stir into the sugar mixture.
5. Add eggs and vanilla extract to the sugar mixture, stirring until blended.
6. Sift flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt together in another bowl.
7. Blend dry ingredients well with the wet ingredients.
8. Stir in grated zucchini.
9. Pour batter into prepared pan.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Allow cake to cool to room temperature before serving.
12. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top of the cake before serving.
